originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Dow Hits High But AI Tumbles; Apple, Robinhood Are Buys As Tesla, Sandisk Dive
summary: The stock market had strong weekly gains, but it didn't feel that way with Sandisk and other AI plays selling off Thursday.
content: The stock market had strong weekly gains, but it didn't feel that way with Sandisk and other AI plays selling off Thursday.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：道琼斯指数触及高位，但 AI 下跌；苹果、Robinhood 被收购，特斯拉、Sandisk 纷纷下注
chineseSummary: 股市每周都有强劲上涨，但周四 Sandisk 和其他人工智能公司的抛售却没有带来这种感觉。
chineseContent: 股市每周都有强劲上涨，但周四 Sandisk 和其他人工智能公司的抛售却没有带来这种感觉。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
